digest.en: Iran says it won't reopen the Strait of Hormuz as long as the U.S. blockade remains. The White House accuses Tehran of 'acting like a bunch of pirates' after an attack on two ships. US Navy chief is out as Iran seizes two ships amid the Hormuz blockade.
digest.hi:
अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने कहा कि समझदारी से समझौता नहीं किया जा सकता। व्हाइट हाउस ने युद्धविराम की समयसीमा पर बयान दिया। मध्य पूर्व में तनाव बढ़ रहा है।

ईरान ने होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य में तीन मालवाहक जहाज़ों पर हमले के बाद दो को ज़ब्त कर लिया। इस घटना ने ऊर्जा संकट की आशंका को बढ़ा दिया है।

रक्षा मंत्री राजनाथ सिंह ने पनडुब्बी बनाने वाले संयंत्र का दौरा किया और नौसेना की आधुनिक तकनीकों का अवलोकन किया।

articles.title: Iran says won't reopen Hormuz as long as U.S. blockade remains
articles.summary: Iran seized two ships attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz and has not decided on joining new US talks. Iran Guards say 'seized' two ships attempting to cross Strait of Hormuz; Iran says it has yet to decide whether to join a new round of talks with the U. S.

articles.title: White House accuses Tehran of ‘acting like a bunch of pirates’ after attack on two ships
articles.summary: The White House accused Tehran of acting like pirates after Iran attacked two ships. Iran-US war latest: White House accuses Tehran of ‘acting like a bunch of pirates’ after attack on two ships The Independent.

articles.title: US Navy chief out as Iran seizes 2 ships amid Hormuz blockade: Live updates
articles.summary: Iran seized two ships amid a Hormuz blockade and the US Navy chief is out. US Navy chief out as Iran seizes 2 ships amid Hormuz blockade: Live updates USA Today.

articles.title: White House says Trump ‘satisfied’ with blockade after Iran says it seized two ships in strait of
articles.summary: Iran seized two ships in the Strait of Hormuz. The White House said Trump is satisfied with the blockade. Middle East crisis live: White House says Trump ‘satisfied’ with blockade after Iran says it seized two ships in strait of Hormuz The Guardian.

articles.title: Why the US military is stuck using US$1 million missiles against Iran’s US$20,000 drones
articles.summary: The US military uses $1 million missiles against Iran's $20,000 drones due to bureaucracy. The US military doesn’t have a technology problem – it has a bureaucracy problem, says a former US Air Force officer.

articles.title: Why emerging markets are dismissing bad Iran news
articles.summary: Emerging markets rebounded despite bad Iran news, showing value in the space. The fact that developing nations’ equities are able to rebound despite the bloc’s vulnerability to energy shocks shows there’s value in this space, says Shuli Ren for Bloomberg Opinion.

articles.title: Three Ships Attacked in Strait of Hormuz, Escorting Two to Its Coast
articles.summary: Three ships were attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, with two escorted to the Iranian coast. The incident occurred in a vital waterway for global oil shipments. Authorities are investigating the attacks.

articles.title: Interview – Rhys Machold - E-International Relations
articles.summary: Rhys Machold was interviewed by E-International Relations. Details of the interview are not specified. The interview is available on the E-International Relations website. Interview – Rhys Machold E-International Relations. Interview – Rhys Machold - E-International Relations.

articles.title: Virtual Panel on United States-South Africa Relations: Ambassador Bozell and a Shifting Global
articles.summary: Ambassador Bozell discussed United States-South Africa relations at a virtual panel. Virtual Panel on United States-South Africa Relations: Ambassador Bozell and a Shifting Global Landscape Global Atlanta.

articles.title: Turkiye making efforts to revive Russia-Ukraine talks, says Erdogan
articles.summary: Turkish President Erdogan stated that Türkiye is making efforts to revive Russia-Ukraine talks. Erdogan met with NATO chief as Kyiv asked Ankara to host a leaders' level meeting with Russia.

articles.title: Iranian Forces Claim to Seize 2 Ships Near Strait of Hormuz After Trump Extends Truce
articles.summary: Iranian forces seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz after Trump extended a truce. Iran War Live Updates: Iranian Forces Claim to Seize 2 Ships Near Strait of Hormuz After Trump Extends Truce The New York Times.

articles.title: Israeli forces fire tear gas at funeral of Palestinians killed by settlers
articles.summary: Israeli forces fired tear gas at a funeral of two Palestinians killed by settlers in the occupied West Bank. The incident occurred at a school where the funeral was being held.

articles.title: Trump calls for Republicans to unify around budget reconciliation push
articles.summary: Former US President Trump called for Republicans to unify around a budget reconciliation push. This would allow conservative lawmakers to bypass Democratic opposition in the Senate with a simple majority.

articles.title: Trump calls Virginia election ‘rigged’ after redistricting referendum
articles.summary: Trump claimed the Virginia election was rigged after a slim majority of 51.4% voted in favour of redistricting. The measure passed with a narrow margin of 3.9 percentage points. Trump’s comments came after the Virginia measure passed by a slim margy of 51.4 in favour and 48.5 against.

articles.title: Dutch intelligence assesses when Russia could move toward conflict with NATO - RBC-Ukraine
articles.summary: Dutch intelligence is assessing when Russia might move towards conflict with NATO. The assessment is not specified in the available information. Dutch intelligence assesses when Russia could move toward conflict with NATO RBC-Ukraine.

articles.title: Iran attacks 3 ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Trump indefinitely extends ceasefire
articles.summary: Iran attacked three ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Trump extended a ceasefire indefinitely. Live updates: Iran attacks 3 ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Trump indefinitely extends ceasefire AP News.

articles.title: 2 Journalists Injured In Israeli Airstrike In Lebanon
articles.summary: Two Al-Akhbar journalists were injured in an Israeli airstrike in Lebanon. The Lebanese daily newspaper Al-Akhbar said its two journalists were injured in Israeli strike. 2 Journalists Injured In Israeli Airstrike In Lebanon.

articles.title: Putin Can Meet Zelensky Only To Agree Final Conflict Arrangements: Kremlin
articles.summary: Russian President Putin can only meet Ukrainian President Zelenskiy to finalize conflict agreements, Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said. The purpose of any meeting would be to agree on the conflict's final arrangements.

articles.title: Iran Says Reopening Strait of Hormuz 'Not Possible' Under US Naval Blockade
articles.summary: Iran has stated it cannot reopen the Strait of Hormuz under a US naval blockade. The statement comes after the US-Iran conflict began on February 28. US-Iran war broke out on February 28.

articles.title: To Iran, Trump Blinked First by Extending the Cease-Fire
articles.summary: Iran's leaders believe they can outlast President Trump in a standoff, which could devastate average Iranians economically. Iran’s leaders believe that they can withstand an enduring standoff longer than President Trump.

articles.title: Nepal Home Minister Sudan Gurung Resigns In Weeks Over Financial Transactions
articles.summary: Nepal Home Minister Sudan Gurung resigned over financial transactions. Gurung is the second minister to leave the new government. Nepal Home Minister Sudan Gurung Resigns In Weeks Over Financial Transactions.

articles.title: पहले चरण में किन सीटों पर दिग्गजों की प्रतिष्ठा दांव पर, कहां सबसे कड़ा मुकाबला?
articles.summary: पश्चिम बंगाल में विधानसभा चुनाव का पहला चरण शुरू हो रहा है, जिसमें 16 जिलों की 152 सीटों पर मतदान होगा। मतदान सुबह 7 बजे से शाम 6 बजे तक चलेगा। इस चरण में कई दिग्गजों की प्रतिष्ठा दांव पर है।

articles.title: सऊदी अरब में क्रिकेट स्टेडियम पाकिस्तान के लिए कितना अहम?
articles.summary: पाकिस्तान क्रिकेट बोर्ड सऊदी अरब के शहर जेद्दा में अंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तर का क्रिकेट स्टेडियम बनाएगा। यह स्टेडियम पाकिस्तान के लिए महत्वपूर्ण होगा और सऊदी अरब में क्रिकेट को बढ़ावा देने में मदद करेगा।

articles.title: अमेरिका की ओर से युद्धविराम बढ़ाने पर अरब मीडिया में क्या कहा जा रहा है?
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने ईरान के साथ युद्धविराम को आगे बढ़ा दिया है. इस पर अरब मीडिया में मिश्रित प्रतिक्रियाएं आई हैं. इस पर अरब जगत का मीडिया क्या कह रहा है?

articles.title: ईरान ने कैसे हासिल की ड्रोन तकनीक में महारत
articles.summary: ईरान ने ड्रोन तकनीक में महारत हासिल की है, जिसका उपयोग दुश्मन की रक्षा व्यवस्था को थकाने और उनके बजट पर दबाव बनाने के लिए किया जा रहा है। ईरान इसी रणनीति के तहत अपने ड्रोन कार्यक्रम में निवेश करता रहा है।

hi.title: ईरान ने कैसे हासिल की ड्रोन तकनीक में महारत

articles.title: ईरान ने तीन मालवाहक जहाज़ों पर हमले के बाद दो को ज़ब्त किया
articles.summary: ईरान के इस्लामिक रिवोल्यूशनरी गार्ड कॉर्प्स ने बुधवार को तीन कार्गो जहाजों पर हमला किया और दो को ज़ब्त कर लिया. यह घटना ईरान जंग को लेकर ट्रंप की ओर से युद्धविराम को बढ़ाये जाने के बाद हुई.

articles.title: भारत ने संरा महासचिव पद की उम्मीदवार बाचेलेत से सुरक्षा परिषद सुधार के लक्ष्यों पर सवाल किए
articles.summary: भारत ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र महासचिव पद की उम्मीदवार बाचेलेत से सुरक्षा परिषद सुधार के लक्ष्यों पर सवाल किए। भारत ने उनसे उनकी प्राथमिकताओं और सुधार के तरीकों के बारे में जानकारी मांगी। यह सवाल भारत की सुरक्षा परिषद में सुधार की मांग को दर्शाता है।
